tool_args.label: Giovanni DiMaggio pursuit of coworker assailant

payload.description: Structure Maintainer Giovanni DiMaggio pursued the individual responsible for harming a coworker, ensuring justice was served.
William Matheson III prepared for summer operations by personally inspecting every line and location for air comfort system functionality.

tool_args.label: Escalator emergency stop at Lexington Avenue and 63rd Street

payload.description: E&E Apprentice Adam Brahimi activated the Emergency Stop Button on escalator ES458 at Lexington Avenue and 63rd Street after witnessing an elderly passenger fall, preventing further injury.

tool_args.label: Paratransit fleet transition and PTA Astoria launch

payload.description: Paratransit decommissioned dedicated carrier MV, relocated nearly one-third of fleet to new operational sites, and launched new dedicated carrier location PTA in Astoria.

tool_args.label: Transit All-Stars employee recognition program description

payload.claim_text: Transit All-Stars is an employee recognition program that celebrates high performers who are also on-target to meet or exceed annual NYCT's service and safety goals.
Over the past year, Paratransit has experienced unprecedented levels of ridership, requiring its fleet to operate at peak capacity
